questions.question: Name at least three of the five Cosby Show Kids.
What character duo said, if a certain female were President, she would be "Babe-raham Lincoln"?
questions.answer: Wayne and Garth in Wayne's World

questions.question: "Clock strikes upon the hour/And the sun begins to fade/Still enough time to figure out/How to chase my blues away."  Name the song.
questions.answer: "I Wanna Dance with Somebody" by Whitney Houston

questions.question: Name the oil tanker that spilled more than 11 million gallons of crude oil in the Prince William Sound in Alaska in 1989.
If someone told you to "kick rocks," what did they want you to do?
